description: Deny-all NetworkPolicy applied to applications namespace, causing health probes to fail, pods to become unready, deployments to degrade, and DSC to report multiple components unhealthy
root_cause: Deny-all NetworkPolicy blocking all ingress and egress traffic in applications namespace
expected_symptoms: Multiple pods become unready due to failed health probes
Some components crash (CrashLoopBackOff) due to network block
DSC reports multiple components as not ready
Errors visible across pods, deployments, and DSC sections simultaneously
expected_remediation: Delete the deny-all-cascade-test NetworkPolicy from the applications namespace; pods will recover as network traffic is restored
